hero.subtitle: Upload any PDF and get instant AI-generated summaries. Extract key insights in seconds, not hours.

features.title: Why Choose PDF Summary?
features.subtitle: Our AI-powered platform makes document analysis faster and easier than ever.

fast.title: Lightning Fast
fast.desc: Get comprehensive summaries in seconds. Our optimized AI processes documents instantly, saving you hours of reading time.

secure.title: Secure & Private
secure.desc: Your documents are encrypted and processed securely. We never share your data with third parties. Your privacy is our priority.

free.title: Free to Start
free.desc: Get 5 free summaries every day. No credit card required. Upgrade only when you need more. Simple, transparent pricing.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to get insights from your PDFs
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up in seconds with just your email. No credit card needed.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to browse. Supports files up to 20MB.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Receive a comprehensive AI-generated summary in seconds.

cta.title: Ready to save time?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of professionals who use PDF Summary to extract insights faster.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs. Upgrade anytime.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.cancelAnswer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. You'll continue to have access until the end of your billing period.
faq.payment: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.paymentAnswer: We accept all major credit cards through our secure payment partner, Stripe.
faq.trialAnswer: Our Free plan lets you try the service with no commitment. Upgrade to Pro when you're ready.

tips.resultsDesc: Use PDFs with clear text. Scanned documents may have lower accuracy.
tips.secureDesc: Your documents are encrypted and automatically deleted after processing.

upload.dragDrop: Click or drag PDF file here
